tools.name: Arena (formerly LMArena)
tools.description: Community-driven platform for evaluating LLMs through anonymous side-by-side battles and multi-modal arena modes.
tools.notes: Rebranded from Chatbot Arena -> LMArena -> Arena in Jan 2026. Supports Text, Code, Image, Video, and Agent evaluation.

tools.name: g4f.dev
tools.description: Open-source project providing free access to 100+ AI models via unified API and web chat interface. No signup required.
tools.notes: 50M+ API requests. Python/JS SDKs, CLI, OpenAI-compatible REST API. GPL-3.0 licensed.

tools.name: Genspark
tools.description: All-in-one AI workspace with 15+ models, Mixture-of-Agents tech, AI slides/docs/images/video generation.
tools.referrals: yes - 1 month Plus plan per invited user. Affiliate program 20% commission via Impact.
tools.notes: 100 free credits/day. Plus $19.99/mo. $275M Series B at $1.25B valuation.

tools.name: Hugging Face Chat
tools.description: Open-source chat app with 119+ open source models, auto-routing via Omni, web search, code execution, MCP servers.
tools.notes: Free tier ~1000 req/day. Pro $9/mo. Apache-2.0 licensed.

tools.name: Poe
tools.description: Access the best AI from many companies in a single interface across all devices.
tools.referrals: yes - Creator Monetization program (earn per message/subscription). No standard user referral.
tools.notes: Login via Google/Apple/phone only (no email). 300 free points/day. Plans from $4.99/mo. 1M+ custom bots.

tools.name: ChatHub
tools.description: All-in-one chatbot client that lets you use multiple AI models simultaneously with side-by-side comparison and image generation.
tools.notes: Available as web app, browser extension, iOS/Android, and desktop. 300K+ users. Pro $19/mo, Unlimited $39/mo.

tools.name: SharedChat
tools.description: AI-powered collaborative chat platform with multiple AI models in the same conversation, smart routing, and real-time collaboration.
tools.notes: Free tier (GPT-4o-mini, Claude Haiku 3.5, Gemini Flash-Lite). Paid: Basic $7/mo, Standard $30/mo, Pro $75/mo, Expert $200/mo. Auto Mode routes to best model. iOS app available.

tools.name: free.oaibest.com
tools.description: Free ChatGPT mirror site offering GPT-4 and other AI models without login. Part of the oaibest.com ecosystem.
tools.notes: Completely free, no signup. Requires VPN/international network access. Site returns 403 via Cloudflare — may be geo-blocked. Parent site oaibest.com has paid API proxy at api.oaibest.com.

tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.description: AI-powered chatbot by OpenAI that generates text, images, audio, and code using GPT-5 family models with deep research and agent capabilities.
tools.referrals: yes - Periodic promotional referral campaigns (e.g. 3 months Plus free). Student referral program in select regions.
tools.notes: Sora video gen discontinued April 2026. Free tier shows ads (since Feb 2026). Plans: Free, Go $8/mo, Plus $20/mo, Pro $100-200/mo, Business $25-30/user/mo. Default model: GPT-5.5 Instant.

tools.name: DeepSeek
tools.description: Chinese AI research lab building open-source LLMs with free chat access and affordable API, offering frontier-class reasoning and coding.
tools.notes: Chat completely free, no paywall. API cheap: Flash $0.14/1M input, Pro $0.435/1M input. Models MIT-licensed, open-weight. V4 flagship: 1.6T total/49B active params, 1M context. Data routes through China servers.

tools.name: Kimi
tools.description: AI chatbot and workspace by Moonshot AI, featuring K2.6 model with long-context understanding, coding, and agent swarm capabilities.
tools.referrals: yes - Invite friends to earn Agent unit rewards (1 unit participation, 5 units if friend subscribes). 10 units for discount link shares.
tools.notes: K2.6 is latest model (April 2026) with SOTA coding and agent swarm. Free tier (Adagio) with basic chat; paid $19-$199/mo unlocks K2.6, deep research, agent tools.

tools.name: Gemini
tools.description: Google's multimodal AI assistant that processes and generates text, images, audio, video, and code.
tools.referrals: no - Google AI Pro subscribers can gift 4 months free to up to 10 friends, but not a rewards-based referral program.
tools.notes: Tiers: Free, AI Plus $7.99/mo, AI Pro $19.99/mo, AI Ultra $99.99/mo. Gemini Spark is persistent personal agent. API pricing varies by model.

tools.name: Perplexity
tools.description: AI answer engine that researches the open web in real-time and returns concise, cited answers using multiple frontier models.
tools.referrals: yes - Referrer and friend each receive $15 cash (via Dub) when friend downloads Comet browser and submits a query. US only.
tools.notes: Uses Model Council orchestration to route queries to best model. Pro $20/mo, Max $200/mo. Also offers Comet browser and Computer agentic tool.

tools.name: Meta AI
tools.description: Free personal AI assistant that generates images, videos, and text across Meta apps (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook) and the web.
tools.notes: Meta One subs: Plus $7.99/mo, Premium $19.99/mo. Free tier with usage limits. Powered by Llama models. Integrated across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, Meta AI glasses.

tools.name: Grok
tools.description: xAI's conversational AI with real-time X/Twitter data access, irreverent tone, and multimodal generation capabilities.
tools.notes: Standalone via grok.com (no X Premium+ required since late 2025). Free Basic plan. SuperGrok $30/mo, SuperGrok Heavy $300/mo. Generates 6-sec videos with sound. App Store 4.9 rating, 100M-500M Play Store installs.

tools.name: Mistral
tools.description: European AI assistant powered by Mistral's open-weight models, featuring chat, canvas, web search, image generation, and agentic coding via Vibe.
tools.notes: Free tier includes ALL Mistral models with limits: ~6x messages, 5x web searches, 40x image gens. Pro $14.99/mo. Open-weight under Apache 2.0/MIT.

tools.name: MiniMax
tools.description: Multimodal AI platform offering text, video, speech, and music generation through proprietary models including M3, M2.7, Hailuo.
tools.referrals: yes - Co-builder Referral Program. Mutual 10% reward: referrer gets 10% voucher on invitee's payment, invitee gets 10% off. Valid 90 days. Until June 30, 2026.
tools.notes: MiniMax Agent free for limited time. Chat interface free to use. API pay-as-you-go with 7 req/mo free. M3 launched June 2026 with 1M context.

tools.name: LobeChat
tools.description: Open-source ChatGPT/LLM UI framework supporting 42+ model providers with agent marketplace, plugins, and multi-agent collaboration.
tools.referrals: no - LobeHub cloud requires invite codes and offers 2M credits per referral, but gated early-access only.
tools.notes: Rebranded to LobeHub. Free tier 500K credits/month. 42+ providers. 332K+ Skills marketplace, 65K+ MCP servers. 78.5K GitHub stars.

tools.name: Claude
tools.description: AI assistant by Anthropic using Constitutional AI for safe, helpful, and honest conversations with strong reasoning, coding, and analysis.
tools.referrals: yes - MAX plan subscribers ($100-$200/mo) can generate 3 Guest Passes (7-day Pro trials). $10 credit per friend conversion.
tools.notes: Free tier: Sonnet 4.6 and Haiku 4.5 with ~15-40 messages per 5-hour window. Pro $20/mo adds Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Cowork. Max $100/$200/mo.

tools.name: Copilot
tools.description: Microsoft's AI companion with web-grounded answers, writing help, image generation, and voice interactions.
tools.notes: Free tier uses GPT-5 via Smart mode, 15 image boosts/day. Login optional. Paid $30/user/mo unlocks GPT-5.4 Thinking, GPT-5.5, Claude, M365 integration.

tools.name: NoteGPT
tools.description: All-in-one AI learning assistant that summarizes YouTube videos, PDFs, and audio, transcribes content, generates images/audio, and provides multi-model AI chat.
tools.notes: Free plan 15 quotas/month. AI Chat page no sign-up required, full features need login. 11 models: GPT-5, GPT-5.1, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.5, DeepSeek V3.2/V4, Gemini 3 Pro/3.1 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.5/Opus 4.7/4.8.

tools.name: Duck.ai
tools.description: Private AI chat by DuckDuckGo that anonymizes conversations with 3rd-party models. No tracking, no data storage, no AI training.
tools.notes: Free tier 6 models. Plus $9.99/mo adds GPT-4o, GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Llama 4 Maverick. Pro adds Claude Opus 4.7. Voice chat supported. No account required. DuckDuckGo subscription bundles VPN + AI.
